Landing.heroSubtitle: With dynamic topic generation via Bring-Your-Own-Key AI models (Gemini, Groq, Ollama), visual content creation with Pollinations.ai, a personalized AI tutor, and a smart quiz system, take your learning experience
Landing.featuresSubtitle: An education experience powered by modern technologies and artificial intelligence
Landing.featureAiLearningDesc: Personalized question recommendations and difficulty level adjustment powered by artificial intelligence
Landing.featureAnalyticsDesc: Discover your weak points with detailed performance analysis and progress tracking
Landing.featurePwaDesc: Install on your mobile device, work offline, and enjoy a native app experience
Landing.featureFlashcardsDesc: Effective spaced repetition systems with AI-recommended flashcards
Landing.featureQuestionGenDesc: A smart system that automatically creates high-quality questions with Google Gemini AI
Landing.featureSecurityDesc: Your data is stored securely and our privacy policies are transparent
Landing.quickStartSubtitle: Access all platform features with one click
Landing.demoCtaSubtitle: Explore all platform features with specially prepared demo data
Landing.subjectCreationSubtitle: Automatically create subject topics with artificial intelligence and define your learning goals
Landing.subjectGenDesc: Automatic subject creation with Google Gemini AI using category, difficulty level, and custom guidelines
Landing.subjectQualityDesc: Perfect course content with AI-powered quality scoring, validation, and improvement suggestions
Landing.subjectGoalsDesc: Define detailed learning objectives, topics, and prerequisites for each subject
Landing.subjectGuidelinesDesc: Create subjects in your preferred style and content by giving custom instructions to AI
Landing.subjectReviewDesc: Review generated subjects, select the ones you want, and add them to your subject list
Landing.subjectOrganizationDesc: Automatic classification by category and difficulty level assignment
Landing.subjectCtaSubtitle: Use demo mode to try the AI-powered subject creation feature
Landing.techStackSubtitle: A professional platform built with industry-standard technologies

AIFeatures.title: AI-Powered Features
AIFeatures.subtitle: An education experience powered by Google Gemini, Pollinations.ai, and modern AI technologies
AIFeatures.topicExplainerDesc: Dynamic topic explanations with Google Gemini, step-by-step learning, and Markdown support
AIFeatures.imageGenDesc: Educational visuals, topic-specific illustrations, and high-quality visual content with Pollinations.ai
AIFeatures.aiAssistantDesc: 24/7 AI-powered learning assistant with Q&A and personalized guidance
AIFeatures.modernTechStackDesc: Next.js 15.3.3, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and enterprise-level development tools
AIFeatures.qualityAssuranceDesc: Python project check script, ESLint, TypeScript strict mode, and automated testing system

Performance.title: Speed and Reliability Combined
Performance.subtitle: We have prepared a modern, seamless, fast, and device-compatible platform for a professional education experience.
Performance.card1Desc: No waiting between pages. Instantly access the information you're looking for with our AI-powered infrastructure.
Performance.card2Desc: Continue learning even if your internet connection drops. All your data is securely synced on your device.
Performance.card3Desc: Experience flawless accessibility on any device thanks to its modern web standard-compliant design.

Mobile.title: Flawless Experience on Every Device
Mobile.subtitle: The same high-quality education on your phone, tablet, or computer. Plus, you can install it on your device without needing any app store.
Mobile.card1Desc: Navigate menus effortlessly and swipe cards with its specially designed touch-friendly interface.
Mobile.card2Desc: Add it directly to your phone from your browser and start using it instantly, skipping the hassle of app stores.
Mobile.card3Desc: Whether you use a small smartphone or a wide monitor, the interface always adjusts perfectly for you.

PrivacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
PrivacyPolicy.intro: This Privacy Policy explains how your personal data is collected, used, and protected when you use the Mindhouse platform. By using Mindhouse, you agree to the terms described below.
PrivacyPolicy.section1Content: We collect your name, email address, and learning preferences during registration. Usage data, device information, and cookies may also be collected to improve your experience.
PrivacyPolicy.section2Content: Your data is used to personalize your learning experience, provide platform features, and improve our services. Your personal information is not sold to third parties.
PrivacyPolicy.section3Content: Industry-standard security measures are applied to protect your data from unauthorized access, alteration, or disclosure. However, transmission over the internet is never 100% secure.
PrivacyPolicy.section4Content: You have the right to access, update, or delete your personal data at any time. For requests or questions, please contact us at <email>support@mindhouse.com</email>.
PrivacyPolicy.section5Content: Mindhouse operates in compliance with applicable data protection regulations. Your personal data is processed and protected within the framework of legal grounds.
PrivacyPolicy.section6Content: Our platform uses cookies to improve user experience and remember your preferences. You can disable cookies in your browser settings, but some features may not work properly.
PrivacyPolicy.section7Content: This Privacy Policy may be updated from time to time. Changes will be published on this page with an updated date. Users will be notified by email for significant changes.

Pricing.title: Pricing
Pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your needs. All plans include a 30-day free trial.
Pricing.freeDescription: For curious minds exploring AI-powered learning
Pricing.premiumDescription: Accelerate your learning with cloud sync and advanced integrations
Pricing.enterpriseDescription: Pay for a full year upfront and get all Pro features.
Pricing.faq1Question: How does the Annual Plan work?
Pricing.faq1Answer: When you choose the Annual Plan, you pay for a full year of Pro upfront and instantly save over 20%.
Pricing.faq2Question: Can I upgrade or downgrade my plan?
Pricing.faq2Answer: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. Changes will be reflected in your next billing cycle.
Pricing.faq3Question: What is BYOK (Bring Your Own Key)?
Pricing.faq3Answer: You use your own API key (Gemini, Groq, or Ollama). This means no hidden AI markups—you only pay your provider for what you actually use.
Pricing.faq4Question: What payment methods do you accept?
Pricing.faq4Answer: We use LemonSqueezy to securely accept all major credit cards worldwide.
Pricing.ctaDescription: Contact us and we'll recommend the best plan for you.

Help.title: Help Center
Help.subtitle: Everything you need to use Mindhouse more effectively
Help.faqDescription: The most commonly asked questions and answers
Help.noResults: No results match your search criteria.
Help.faq1Answer: Mindhouse is an AI-powered personalized education platform. It delivers a smart learning experience focused on each student's individual needs. You can ask questions with AI Tutor, take tests with the Quiz system, and review with Flashcards.
Help.faq2Question: How do I use AI Tutor?
Help.faq2Answer: Go to the AI Tutor page and type your question. The AI will provide topic-specific explanations and solutions. You can also ask questions by speaking with the voice assistant feature.
Help.faq3Question: How does the quiz system work?
Help.faq3Answer: Select a topic on the Quiz page and start a test. The system provides personalized questions, analyzes your results, and identifies your weak areas.
Help.faq4Answer: Select a topic on the Flashcard page. The system presents cards using a spaced repetition algorithm. Mark the cards you know; you'll see the ones you don't again.
Help.faq5Answer: With a premium subscription, you get unlimited AI questions, advanced analytics, custom lesson plans, a voice assistant, and more.
Help.faq6Answer: Yes, all your data is stored encrypted. Your data is protected by our GDPR-compliant privacy policy.
Help.faq7Answer: Yes, we offer custom enterprise plans for schools and companies, including bulk user management, custom reports, and API access.
Help.faq8Question: How can I get technical support?
Help.faq8Answer: You can reach us through the contact page, call the live support line, or send an email. Our 24/7 support service is available.
Help.tutorial1Description: Learn the platform's core features and take your first steps.
Help.tutorial2Description: Learn how to work with the AI-powered teacher.
Help.tutorial3Description: Discover the process of taking tests and analyzing results.
Help.tutorial4Description: Learn effective study methods with smart cards.
Help.tutorial5Description: Explore the advanced features included with a premium subscription.
Help.tutorial6Description: Learn how to track your performance.
Help.gettingStartedDesc: Your first step on the platform

Contact.title: Contact
Contact.subtitle: Get in touch with Mindhouse. We're ready to answer your questions.
Contact.formDescription: Send us your questions, suggestions, or partnership proposals
Contact.successMessage: Your message was sent successfully! We'll get back to you as soon as possible.
Contact.errorMessage: An error occurred while sending your message. Please try again.
Contact.faq1Answer: Mindhouse is an AI-powered personalized education platform. It delivers a smart learning experience focused on each student's individual needs.
Contact.faq2Answer: Basic features are free. A premium subscription is required for advanced AI features.
Contact.faq3Question: Do I have to choose from predefined subjects?
Contact.faq3Answer: No! You can add any subject you want. Mindhouse is a customizable study companion. You can manually enter your own subjects or generate new subjects and study materials using AI.
Contact.faq4Question: Where is my study data stored?
Contact.faq4Answer: All your study subjects, questions, and test results are stored locally on your device (IndexedDB). None of your personal study data is sent to our servers, ensuring complete privacy and data ownership.

TermsOfService.title: Terms of Service
TermsOfService.intro: These Terms of Service govern your use of the Mindhouse platform. By accessing or using Mindhouse, you agree to comply with these terms.
TermsOfService.section1Content: By registering for or using Mindhouse, you accept these Terms of Service and the Privacy Policy. If you do not agree, please do not use the platform.
TermsOfService.section2Content: You may use Mindhouse for personal, non-commercial educational purposes. You agree not to misuse the platform or attempt unauthorized access.
TermsOfService.section3Content: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account and for all activities under your account. You agree to provide accurate information and update it when necessary.
TermsOfService.section4Content: Mindhouse is provided "as is" without any warranties. We are not liable for damages arising from the use of the platform.
TermsOfService.section5Content: For questions about these terms, please contact us at <email>support@mindhouse.com</email>.

step1.title: 1. Write a Prompt

step3.title: 3. Explore Interactively
step3.description: Rotate the model with mouse, zoom in, examine from different angles

step4.title: 4. Use in Education
step4.description: Use 3D models in biology, chemistry, and physics classes

CloudSync.pageDescription: Securely sync your data between local storage and the cloud
CloudSync.title: Cloud Sync
CloudSync.loginRequiredDesc: You need to sign in to sync your data with the cloud.
CloudSync.accountSyncDesc: Data sync management for your {email} account
CloudSync.syncDescription: Sync your data between local storage and the cloud
CloudSync.uploadDesc: Upload your local data to cloud storage
CloudSync.downloadDesc: Download your cloud data to local storage
CloudSync.noDataYet: No data yet. Start adding data from Subject Manager or Question Manager.
CloudSync.localOnly: You have local data but nothing in the cloud. Upload with "Local → Cloud".
CloudSync.cloudOnly: You have cloud data but nothing in local storage. Download with "Cloud → Local".
CloudSync.bothData: You have both local and cloud data. Merge them with "Full Sync".

AiFlashcardSetup.title: AI Flashcard Setup Guide
AiFlashcardSetup.subtitle: Follow the required steps to enable AI features

overview.whyAiDescription: AI speeds up your learning process and generates personalized content. It saves time, helps you understand topics better, and increases your study efficiency.
overview.reqApiKeyDesc: Create a free account and get an API key

setup.step1Description: Obtain an API key from Google Gemini, Groq, or configure Ollama
setup.step1Item2Desc: Get an API key for high-performance open source models
setup.step1Item3Desc: Use Ollama to run local models on your own computer
setup.step1Item4Desc: Your API keys are stored only in your local browser (Local Storage)
setup.securityWarningDesc: Your API keys are stored completely in your local browser (Local Storage) in an encrypted format. They are never sent to or saved on our servers.
setup.step2Title: Step 2: Go to the Settings Page
setup.step2Description: Complete the configuration from the in-app Settings panel
setup.step3Description: Select your provider, paste your key, and click the Save Settings button.

testing.testDescription: Verify that AI features work correctly
testing.step2Desc: Enter and save your Gemini or Groq API key
testing.step3Desc: Return to Flashcard Manager, select subject and topic, then generate with AI
testing.step4Desc: If flashcards were successfully generated, setup is complete!

troubleshooting.title: Common Issues and Solutions
troubleshooting.apiKeyErrorDesc: This error indicates that your API key was not entered or saved on the Settings page.
troubleshooting.apiKeySolution2: Make sure you entered the API key correctly for your selected provider (e.g. Gemini)
troubleshooting.apiKeySolution3: Make sure you clicked the 'Save Settings' button at the bottom of the page
troubleshooting.failedGenDesc: Your API key might be invalid or your quota might be exhausted.
troubleshooting.failedGenSolution1: Check if your API key is correct and active
troubleshooting.failedGenSolution3: Check detailed error messages in the browser console (F12)
troubleshooting.envVarDesc: You are receiving an error connecting to the local Ollama service.
troubleshooting.envVarSolution1: Make sure the Ollama service is running on your computer (ollama run command)
troubleshooting.envVarSolution2: Check if the Ollama URL is configured correctly on the Settings page (default: http://localhost:11434)
troubleshooting.envVarSolution3: Make sure CORS settings are allowed on Ollama
troubleshooting.stillIssuesDesc: If the issue is not resolved, check the API key configurations on the Settings page and your browser's console outputs.
troubleshooting.envCheckInstruction: You can check your active AI configuration in real-time from the Settings panel.
troubleshooting.envCheckHint: A green 'Key Configured' badge is displayed when a valid API key is saved
troubleshooting.consoleCheckDesc: Press F12 to open Developer Tools and check error messages in the Console tab.

Voice.aiTutorNotAvailable: AI Tutor output is not available yet. Please request AI help first.
Voice.noAnswerOrExplanation: No answer or explanation is available for this question yet.
Voice.noExplanation: No explanation is available for this question yet.
Voice.browserNotSupported: Your browser does not support the voice assistant feature. Use Chrome, Edge, or Safari.
Voice.voiceInputAutoSend: Everything you say is automatically typed and sent

helpCommands.flashcard: Available commands: read question, next, previous, restart, flip, stop, help
helpCommands.quiz: Available commands: read question, read answer, read AI, next, previous, restart, flip, show, hide, stop, help
